title: Complete Nourishment
subtitle: Strengthening with balanced meals
description: At this stage, your appetite is likely consistent and your body’s nutritional needs continue to increase. Focusing on complete and balanced meals with adequate protein and iron can help support your strength and energy.
nutrition_focus: Ensure meals are balanced and complete
Increase intake of protein and iron-rich foods
Maintain consistent meal timing and portion sizes
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, beans, and carrots
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced and complete meals can help you feel stronger and maintain steady energy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and complete meals help support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent and balanced meals support stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Higher intake of iron-rich foods supports building strength and energy.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent iron intake helps improve energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A complete and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
nutrition_focus: Include a balanced mix of nutrients
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance help your body function smoothly.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on complete and balanced meals helps maintain stability and overall well-being.
priority_nutrition: Ensure meals are balanced and complete
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Complete and steady nourishment supports your strength and comfort.
